heading: DISPOSAL OF OBSOLETE OR SURPLUS MATERIAL
label: 875 DISPOSAL OF OBSOLETE OR SURPLUS MATERIAL
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 875, consisting of section 9061, related to miscellaneous investigation requirements and other duties, prior to renumbering as chapter 949 of this title.
